n: The War of the Wine Shops

steps.t: Akhmâra asked you to investigate her business rival. His shop, The Drowned Prince, can be found in the Sail-haven of Umbar Baharbêl.
There is nothing suspicious in The Drowned Prince's latest shipping manifest. Perhaps a conversation with its proprietor would yield some clues. The p…
Mutâz said that Akhmâra is the one guilty of underhanded business practices and has asked you to investigate her. Search for clues around Akhmâra's sh…
The Full Belly's import manifest looks shockingly similar to its rival's. Akhmâra can be found outside her wine shop, the Full Belly, in the Upper War…
Akhmâra plans to confront her brother, Mutâz, at his shop. Go to The Drowned Prince in the Sail-haven of Umbar Baharbêl to witness the confrontation.
